CommunityApplications.Profile:
# AppFlowy Cloud — Unraid Community Apps
Self-host [AppFlowy Cloud](https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy-Cloud), the open-source collaborative workspace and knowledge base (privacy-first Notion alternative).
This repository contains Docker container templates for the full AppFlowy Cloud stack:
- **AppFlowy-Postgres** — PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector (primary database) - **AppFlowy-Redis** — Redis 7 (cache & pub/sub) - **AppFlowy-MinIO** — MinIO S3-compatible object storage - **AppFlowy-GoTrue** — Authentication service (JWT, OAuth, email) - **AppFlowy-Cloud** — Core Rust backend (REST API + WebSocket) - **AppFlowy-Admin** — Admin web console - **AppFlowy-Web** — Browser-based AppFlowy client - **AppFlowy-Worker** — Background job processor - **AppFlowy-Search** — Full-text and semantic search - **AppFlowy-AI** — Optional AI/LLM features (requires OpenAI or Azure OpenAI credentials) - **AppFlowy-Nginx** — Reverse proxy (single public entry point)
**Prerequisites:** Create a custom Docker network named `appflowy` before deploying (Settings → Docker → Custom Networks, or `docker network create appflowy` via SSH).
For setup instructions see the [README](https://github.com/vmalinics0/unraid-appflowy/blob/main/README.md).
**Support:** [Template repository issues](https://github.com/vmalinics0/unraid-appflowy/issues) **Upstream discussions:** [AppFlowy Cloud Discussions](https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy-Cloud/discussions)
